title: Body Parsing, Raw Webhooks, Forms, Multipart Uploads, and Byte Limits · Type-System Trace: Declared Decoded Byte Limits
summary: Parsers accept decompression bombs, req.body is assumed present, raw webhook bytes are lost, multipart data is buffered without caps, and aborted uploads leak work. Planned artifact: Add and verify the httpsts declared decoded byte limits increment in bounded body ownership and parser matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Enforce declared, compressed, decoded, field-count, nesting, and semantic-size budgets before expensive parsing or effects.
Configure express.json type, limit, inflate, strict, reviver, and verify behavior while treating req.body as undefined until parsing succeeds.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
